original_image_tags: Scan of the back of a light-colored card or photographic print. The surface is mostly blank with minor smudges and spots. Typed text "SIDE VIEW" appears in the upper left. A handwritten case number is written vertically in blue ink on the right side.

elements.description: The image shows the back of a physical document or photograph. The typed text 'SIDE VIEW' is visible in the upper left corner. There is a handwritten sequence of numbers '62-83894-24' in blue ink on the right side. The background is off-white paper with minor smudges and spots.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements (back of a card/photo, 'SIDE VIEW' text, handwritten numbers, smudges) but Description B provides the specific handwritten number sequence that Description A omits without contradicting it.
